args: mkdir -p /tmp/files-mcp-dist && cd /home/netherman/code/4th-devs/mcp/files-mcp && npx tsc --outDir /tmp/files-mcp-dist --noEmitOnError false >/tmp/files-mcp-build.log 2>&1; cp package.json /tmp/files-mcp-dist/package.json; ln -sfn "$PWD/node_modules" /tmp/files-mcp-dist/node_modules; exec node /tmp/files-mcp-dist/index.js
